purpose: Expose the existing private Auto and Assistant mode behaviors through the public/private connector without rebuilding private runtime logic in this repo.

runtime_boundary.public_role: Normalize and pass the requested operating_mode, approval expectation, spec path, output refs, and artifact manifest refs.
runtime_boundary.private_role: Own actual Auto and Assistant generation behavior, review loops, template binaries, private design DNA, and premium assets.
runtime_boundary.asset_boundary: Consume approved export manifests and metadata only; do not scan raw external asset-system folders.

auto.review_behavior: record preflight, assumptions, selected template family, validation signals, and revision evidence when the private runtime performs multi-pass work

assistant.review_behavior: surface structure/style choices, questions, approval points, and review-required findings before unattended delivery

blocked_if: private runtime connector is not ready for request
assistant approval expectation is review-required and no explicit continue/skip decision is recorded
